brokers/internal/mt_request_broker.nim
Line Branch Exec Source
1 ## Multi-Thread RequestBroker
2 ## --------------------------
3 ## Generates a multi-thread capable RequestBroker where the provider runs
4 ## on the thread that called `setProvider` (which must keep its chronos
5 ## event loop running), and requests from other threads are routed via
6 ## a lock-free Vyukov MPSC ring + per-bucket payload slab + response slot
7 ## pool.
8 ##
9 ## Same-thread requests bypass the ring and call the provider directly.
10 ##
11 ## See `doc/REFACTOR_MT_QUEUE.md` for the full design; this file is the
12 ## RequestBroker integration of Phase 4 of that plan.
13 ##
14 ## §2.6 safety contract honored by construction (Invariant I0):
15 ## - The bucket-owning thread (the provider thread, the one that
16 ## called `setProvider`) allocates its ring + request slab +
17 ## response slot pool via `createShared`, and frees them via
18 ## `clearProvider` on the same thread.
19 ## - Sender threads only ever touch atomics + memcpy + signal-fire on
20 ## the hot path — never the Nim allocator beyond `claim`/`release`
21 ## of pre-allocated slab cells and response slots.
22
23 {.push raises: [].}
24
25 import std/[macros, strutils, locks, os, atomics]
26 import chronos, chronicles
27 import results
28 import ./helper/broker_utils, ../broker_context
29
30 import ./mt_broker_common, ./mt_queue, ./mt_codec, ./mt_config
31 import ./broker_debug
32 export results, chronos, chronicles, broker_context, mt_broker_common, mt_config
33
34 # Capacity defaults moved to `mt_config.nim` and re-exported via the
35 # `mt_config` module so existing references to `DefaultMtReq*` constants
36 # continue to resolve.
37
38 # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
39 # Macro code generator
40 # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
41
42 proc isAsyncReturnTypeValid(returnType, typeIdent: NimNode): bool =
43 if returnType.kind != nnkBracketExpr or returnType.len != 2:
44 return false
45 if returnType[0].kind != nnkIdent or not returnType[0].eqIdent("Future"):
46 return false
47 let inner = returnType[1]
48 if inner.kind != nnkBracketExpr or inner.len != 3:
49 return false
50 if inner[0].kind != nnkIdent or not inner[0].eqIdent("Result"):
51 return false
52 if inner[1].kind != nnkIdent or not inner[1].eqIdent($typeIdent):
53 return false
54 inner[2].kind == nnkIdent and inner[2].eqIdent("string")
55
56 proc generateMtRequestBroker*(
57 body: NimNode, cfgIn: MtReqCfg = defaultMtReqCfg()
58 ): NimNode =
59 when defined(brokerDebug):
60 echo body.treeRepr
61 echo "RequestBroker mode: mt"
62
63 # Classify legacy (`proc signature*`) vs proc-sugar (lowercase verb procs).
64 # Mirrors request_broker.nim; MT is always async.
65 var hasSignatureProc = false
66 var hasOtherProc = false
67 for stmt in body:
68 if stmt.kind == nnkProcDef:
69 let nm = stmt[0]
70 let nmId = (if nm.kind == nnkPostfix: nm[1] else: nm)
71 if ($nmId).startsWith("signature"):
72 hasSignatureProc = true
73 else:
74 hasOtherProc = true
75 let isSugar = hasOtherProc and not hasSignatureProc
76
77 var typeIdent: NimNode = nil
78 var objectDef: NimNode = nil
79 var payloadType: NimNode = nil
80 var responseFieldTypes: seq[NimNode] = @[]
81 var zeroArgSig: NimNode = nil
82 var zeroArgProviderName: NimNode = nil
83 var argSig: NimNode = nil
84 var argParams: seq[NimNode] = @[]
85 var argProviderName: NimNode = nil
86
87 if not isSugar:
88 let parsed = parseSingleTypeDef(
89 body, "RequestBroker", allowRefToNonObject = true, collectFieldInfo = true
90 )
91 typeIdent = parsed.typeIdent
92 objectDef = parsed.objectDef
93 responseFieldTypes = parsed.fieldTypes
94 payloadType = copyNimTree(typeIdent) # legacy: dispatch tag == payload
95
96 for stmt in body:
97 case stmt.kind
98 of nnkProcDef:
99 let procName = stmt[0]
100 let procNameIdent =
101 case procName.kind
102 of nnkIdent:
103 procName
104 of nnkPostfix:
105 procName[1]
106 else:
107 procName
108 if not ($procNameIdent).startsWith("signature"):
109 error("Signature proc names must start with `signature`", procName)
110 let params = stmt.params
111 if params.len == 0:
112 error("Signature must declare a return type", stmt)
113 let returnType = params[0]
114 if not isAsyncReturnTypeValid(returnType, typeIdent):
115 error(
116 "MT RequestBroker signature must return Future[Result[`" & $typeIdent &
117 "`, string]]",
118 stmt,
119 )
120 let paramCount = params.len - 1
121 if paramCount == 0:
122 if zeroArgSig != nil:
123 error("Only one zero-argument signature is allowed", stmt)
124 zeroArgSig = stmt
125 zeroArgProviderName = ident(sanitizeIdentName(typeIdent) & "ProviderNoArgs")
126 elif paramCount >= 1:
127 if argSig != nil:
128 error("Only one argument-based signature is allowed", stmt)
129 argSig = stmt
130 argParams = @[]
131 for idx in 1 ..< params.len:
132 let paramDef = params[idx]
133 if paramDef.kind != nnkIdentDefs:
134 error(
135 "Signature parameter must be a standard identifier declaration",
136 paramDef,
137 )
138 let paramTypeNode = paramDef[paramDef.len - 2]
139 if paramTypeNode.kind == nnkEmpty:
140 error("Signature parameter must declare a type", paramDef)
141 argParams.add(copyNimTree(paramDef))
142 argProviderName = ident(sanitizeIdentName(typeIdent) & "ProviderWithArgs")
143 of nnkTypeSection, nnkEmpty:
144 discard
145 else:
146 error("Unsupported statement inside RequestBroker definition", stmt)
147
148 if zeroArgSig.isNil() and argSig.isNil():
149 zeroArgSig = newEmptyNode()
150 zeroArgProviderName = ident(sanitizeIdentName(typeIdent) & "ProviderNoArgs")
151 else:
152 # ---- New proc-sugar form (option B / decoupled payload) ----
153 let sg = parseRequestSugar(body, "RequestBroker", async = true)
154 typeIdent = sg.typeIdent
155 objectDef = sg.objectDef
156 payloadType = sg.payloadType
157 responseFieldTypes = sg.fieldTypes
158 if not sg.zeroArgProc.isNil:
159 zeroArgSig = sg.zeroArgProc
160 zeroArgProviderName = ident(sanitizeIdentName(typeIdent) & "ProviderNoArgs")
161 if not sg.argProc.isNil:
162 argSig = sg.argProc
163 argParams = sg.argParams
164 argProviderName = ident(sanitizeIdentName(typeIdent) & "ProviderWithArgs")
165
166 let exportedTypeIdent = postfix(copyNimTree(typeIdent), "*")
167 let typeDisplayName = sanitizeIdentName(typeIdent)
168 let typeNameLit = newLit(typeDisplayName)
169
170 let returnType = quote:
171 Future[Result[`payloadType`, string]]
172
173 # ── Type-driven auto-defaults ───────────────────────────────────────
174 # Void / zero-field response and zero-arg signatures collapse to the
175 # scalar bucket: nothing larger than the Result envelope's tag bytes
176 # ever traverses the wire. Leaving the conservative 64 KB response /
177 # 1 KB payload default in place would otherwise pin a 16 MB response
178 # pool per RequestBroker for what is effectively a notification.
179 var cfg = cfgIn
180 if cfg.maxResponseBytesOrigin == "default":
181 if responseFieldTypes.len > 0:
182 let cls = classifyFieldsMax(responseFieldTypes)
183 cfg.maxResponseBytes = cls.bytes
184 cfg.maxResponseBytesOrigin = "auto:" & cls.reason
185 if cls.reason.startsWith("unclassifiable"):
186 warning(
187 "[brokers] RequestBroker(" & typeDisplayName &
188 ") could not auto-size response (" & cls.reason & "); falling back to " &
189 $cls.bytes & " B. Override with `maxResponseBytes = N`."
190 )
191 else:
192 cfg.maxResponseBytes = ScalarBytes
193 cfg.maxResponseBytesOrigin = "auto:void"
194 if cfg.maxPayloadBytesOrigin == "default":
195 if argParams.len > 0:
196 var argTypes = newSeqOfCap[NimNode](argParams.len)
197 for p in argParams:
198 argTypes.add(p[p.len - 2])
199 let cls = classifyFieldsMax(argTypes)
200 cfg.maxPayloadBytes = cls.bytes
201 cfg.maxPayloadBytesOrigin = "auto:" & cls.reason
202 if cls.reason.startsWith("unclassifiable"):
203 warning(
204 "[brokers] RequestBroker(" & typeDisplayName &
205 ") could not auto-size request payload (" & cls.reason &
206 "); falling back to " & $cls.bytes &
207 " B. Override with `maxPayloadBytes = N`."
208 )
209 else:
210 cfg.maxPayloadBytes = ScalarBytes
211 cfg.maxPayloadBytesOrigin = "auto:void"
212
213 when not defined(brokerConfigSilent):
214 hint(fmtReqCfgSummary(typeDisplayName, cfg))
215
216 # ── Identifier setup ────────────────────────────────────────────────
217 let requestMsgName = ident(typeDisplayName & "MtRequestMsg")
218 let bucketName = ident(typeDisplayName & "MtBucket")
219
220 let globalBucketsIdent = ident("g" & typeDisplayName & "MtBuckets")
221 let globalBucketCountIdent = ident("g" & typeDisplayName & "MtBucketCount")
222 let globalBucketCapIdent = ident("g" & typeDisplayName & "MtBucketCap")
223 let globalLockIdent = ident("g" & typeDisplayName & "MtLock")
224 let globalInitIdent = ident("g" & typeDisplayName & "MtInit")
225 let timeoutVarIdent = ident("g" & typeDisplayName & "MtTimeout")
226
227 let initProcIdent = ident("ensureInit" & typeDisplayName & "MtBroker")
228 let growProcIdent = ident("grow" & typeDisplayName & "MtBuckets")
229 let sendReplyIdent = ident("sendReply" & typeDisplayName)
230 let handleMsgIdent = ident("handleMsg" & typeDisplayName)
231 let pollFnMakerIdent = ident("makePollFn" & typeDisplayName)
232 let shardHintIdent = ident("shardHint" & typeDisplayName)
233 let marshalIdent = ident(typeDisplayName & "MtMarshal")
234 let unmarshalIdent = ident(typeDisplayName & "MtUnmarshal")
235 let marshalSizeIdent = ident(typeDisplayName & "MtMarshalSize")
236 let marshalRespIdent = ident(typeDisplayName & "MtMarshalResp")
237 let unmarshalRespIdent = ident(typeDisplayName & "MtUnmarshalResp")
238 let marshalRespSizeIdent = ident(typeDisplayName & "MtMarshalRespSize")
239
240 let queueDepthLit = newLit(cfg.queueDepth)
241 let slabCapacityLit = newLit(cfg.slabCapacity)
242 let payloadBytesLit = newLit(cfg.maxPayloadBytes)
243 let maxDynPayloadLit = newLit(cfg.maxDynamicPayloadBytes)
244 let responseSlotsLit = newLit(cfg.responseSlots)
245 let responseBytesLit = newLit(cfg.maxResponseBytes)
246 let freeListShardsLit = newLit(uint32(cfg.freeListShards))
247
248 result = newStmtList()
249
250 # ── Type section (typeIdent + provider proc types) ───────────────────
251 var typeSection = newTree(nnkTypeSection)
252 typeSection.add(newTree(nnkTypeDef, exportedTypeIdent, newEmptyNode(), objectDef))
253
254 proc makeProcType(returnType: NimNode, params: seq[NimNode]): NimNode =
255 var formal = newTree(nnkFormalParams)
256 formal.add(returnType)
257 for param in params:
258 formal.add(param)
259 let pragmas = newTree(nnkPragma, ident("async"))
260 newTree(nnkProcTy, formal, pragmas)
261
262 if not zeroArgSig.isNil():
263 let procType = makeProcType(returnType, @[])
264 typeSection.add(newTree(nnkTypeDef, zeroArgProviderName, newEmptyNode(), procType))
265 if not argSig.isNil():
266 let procType = makeProcType(returnType, cloneParams(argParams))
267 typeSection.add(newTree(nnkTypeDef, argProviderName, newEmptyNode(), procType))
268
269 # Request message struct. Carries args inline plus a response-slot
270 # index (the per-bucket pool index where the provider writes the
271 # result) and the requester's signal pointer (so the provider can
272 # wake the requester's dispatcher after writing).
273 var msgRecList = newTree(nnkRecList)
274 msgRecList.add(
275 newTree(nnkIdentDefs, ident("requestKind"), ident("int"), newEmptyNode())
276 )
277 if not argSig.isNil():
278 for paramDef in argParams:
279 for i in 0 ..< paramDef.len - 2:
280 let nameNode = paramDef[i]
281 if nameNode.kind != nnkEmpty:
282 let typeNode = paramDef[paramDef.len - 2]
283 msgRecList.add(
284 newTree(
285 nnkIdentDefs, ident($nameNode), copyNimTree(typeNode), newEmptyNode()
286 )
287 )
288 msgRecList.add(
289 newTree(nnkIdentDefs, ident("responseSlotIdx"), ident("uint32"), newEmptyNode())
290 )
291 msgRecList.add(
292 newTree(
293 nnkIdentDefs, ident("requesterSignal"), ident("ThreadSignalPtr"), newEmptyNode()
294 )
295 )
296 typeSection.add(
297 newTree(
298 nnkTypeDef,
299 requestMsgName,
300 newEmptyNode(),
301 newTree(nnkObjectTy, newEmptyNode(), newEmptyNode(), msgRecList),
302 )
303 )
304
305 # Bucket struct.
306 let responseSlotPoolType = quote:
307 ptr ResponseSlotPool
308 let requestRingType = quote:
309 ptr VyukovMpscRing[uint32]
310 let requestSlabType = quote:
311 ptr PayloadSlab
312
313 var bucketRecList = newTree(nnkRecList)
314 bucketRecList.add(
315 newTree(nnkIdentDefs, ident("brokerCtx"), ident("BrokerContext"), newEmptyNode())
316 )
317 bucketRecList.add(
318 newTree(nnkIdentDefs, ident("ring"), requestRingType, newEmptyNode())
319 )
320 bucketRecList.add(
321 newTree(nnkIdentDefs, ident("slab"), requestSlabType, newEmptyNode())
322 )
323 bucketRecList.add(
324 newTree(
325 nnkIdentDefs, ident("responseSlotPool"), responseSlotPoolType, newEmptyNode()
326 )
327 )
328 bucketRecList.add(
329 newTree(
330 nnkIdentDefs, ident("providerSignal"), ident("ThreadSignalPtr"), newEmptyNode()
331 )
332 )
333 bucketRecList.add(
334 newTree(nnkIdentDefs, ident("threadId"), ident("pointer"), newEmptyNode())
335 )
336 bucketRecList.add(
337 newTree(nnkIdentDefs, ident("threadGen"), ident("uint64"), newEmptyNode())
338 )
339 typeSection.add(
340 newTree(
341 nnkTypeDef,
342 bucketName,
343 newEmptyNode(),
344 newTree(nnkObjectTy, newEmptyNode(), newEmptyNode(), bucketRecList),
345 )
346 )
347
348 result.add(typeSection)
349
350 # ── Codec procs for ReqMsg ───────────────────────────────────────────
351 for procNode in genMtCodecProcs(marshalIdent, unmarshalIdent, requestMsgName):
352 result.add(procNode)
353
354 # ── Codec procs for Result[typeIdent, string] ───────────────────────
355 # Custom — `Result` is a case object on `oResultPrivate`; the generic
356 # `fieldPairs`-based marshaler would touch the wrong-tag fields. We
357 # encode an explicit `isOk` byte followed by either the value (T) or
358 # the error (string), recursively via mtMarshalValue/Unmarshal.
359 result.add(
360 quote do:
361 proc `marshalRespIdent`(
362 buf: ptr UncheckedArray[byte], cap: int, res: Result[`payloadType`, string]
363 ): int {.gcsafe, raises: [].} =
364 var pos = 0
365 if pos + 1 > cap:
366 return -1
367 let isOk = byte(if res.isOk: 1 else: 0)
368 buf[pos] = isOk
369 pos += 1
370 if res.isOk:
371 when not (`payloadType` is void):
372 let val = res.value
373 if not mtMarshalValue(buf, cap, val, pos):
374 return -1
375 else:
376 let errMsg = res.error
377 if not mtMarshalValue(buf, cap, errMsg, pos):
378 return -1
379 return pos
380
381 proc `unmarshalRespIdent`(
382 buf: ptr UncheckedArray[byte],
383 len: int,
384 dst: var Result[`payloadType`, string],
385 ): bool {.gcsafe, raises: [].} =
386 var pos = 0
387 if pos + 1 > len:
388 return false
389 let isOk = buf[pos]
390 pos += 1
391 if isOk == 1'u8:
392 when (`payloadType` is void):
393 dst.ok()
394 else:
395 var val: `payloadType`
396 if not mtUnmarshalValue(buf, len, val, pos):
397 return false
398 dst = ok(Result[`payloadType`, string], val)
399 else:
400 var errMsg: string
401 if not mtUnmarshalValue(buf, len, errMsg, pos):
402 return false
403 dst = err(Result[`payloadType`, string], errMsg)
404 return true
405
406 proc `marshalRespSizeIdent`(
407 res: Result[`payloadType`, string]
408 ): int {.gcsafe, raises: [].} =
409 ## Exact marshaled byte length of a response — mirrors `marshalRespIdent`
410 ## (1 isOk byte + value-or-error). Used to size a heap-spill buffer.
411 result = 1
412 if res.isOk:
413 when not (`payloadType` is void):
414 result += mtMarshalSizeValue(res.value)
415 else:
416 result += mtMarshalSizeValue(res.error)
417
418 )
419
420 # ── Global state ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
421 result.add(
422 quote do:
423 var `globalBucketsIdent`: ptr UncheckedArray[`bucketName`]
424 var `globalBucketCountIdent`: int
425 var `globalBucketCapIdent`: int
426 var `globalLockIdent`: Lock
427 var `globalInitIdent`: Atomic[int]
428 )
429
430 # ── Timeout knob (per broker type) ──────────────────────────────────
431 result.add(
432 quote do:
433 var `timeoutVarIdent`*: Duration = chronos.seconds(5)
434 ## Default timeout for cross-thread requests.
435
436 proc setRequestTimeout*(_: typedesc[`typeIdent`], timeout: Duration) =
437 `timeoutVarIdent` = timeout
438
439 proc requestTimeout*(_: typedesc[`typeIdent`]): Duration =
440 `timeoutVarIdent`
441
442 )
443
444 # ── Init + grow ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
445 result.add(
446 quote do:
447 proc `initProcIdent`() =
448 if `globalInitIdent`.load(moRelaxed) == 2:
449 return
450 var expected = 0
451 if `globalInitIdent`.compareExchange(expected, 1, moAcquire, moRelaxed):
452 initLock(`globalLockIdent`)
453 `globalBucketCapIdent` = 4
454 `globalBucketsIdent` = cast[ptr UncheckedArray[`bucketName`]](createShared(
455 `bucketName`, `globalBucketCapIdent`
456 ))
457 `globalBucketCountIdent` = 0
458 `globalInitIdent`.store(2, moRelease)
459 else:
460 while `globalInitIdent`.load(moAcquire) != 2:
461 discard
462
463 proc `growProcIdent`() =
464 let newCap = `globalBucketCapIdent` * 2
465 let newBuf =
466 cast[ptr UncheckedArray[`bucketName`]](createShared(`bucketName`, newCap))
467 for i in 0 ..< `globalBucketCountIdent`:
468 newBuf[i] = `globalBucketsIdent`[i]
469 `globalBucketsIdent` = newBuf
470 `globalBucketCapIdent` = newCap
471
472 proc `shardHintIdent`(): uint32 {.inline.} =
473 cast[uint32](cast[uint](currentMtThreadId()) shr 4)
474
475 )
476
477 # ── Threadvar provider storage ──────────────────────────────────────
478 var tvNoArgCtxIdent, tvNoArgHandlerIdent: NimNode
479 if not zeroArgSig.isNil():
480 tvNoArgCtxIdent = ident("g" & typeDisplayName & "TvNoArgCtxs")
481 tvNoArgHandlerIdent = ident("g" & typeDisplayName & "TvNoArgHandlers")
482 result.add(
483 quote do:
484 var `tvNoArgCtxIdent` {.threadvar.}: seq[BrokerContext]
485 var `tvNoArgHandlerIdent` {.threadvar.}: seq[`zeroArgProviderName`]
486 )
487
488 var tvWithArgCtxIdent, tvWithArgHandlerIdent: NimNode
489 if not argSig.isNil():
490 tvWithArgCtxIdent = ident("g" & typeDisplayName & "TvWithArgCtxs")
491 tvWithArgHandlerIdent = ident("g" & typeDisplayName & "TvWithArgHandlers")
492 result.add(
493 quote do:
494 var `tvWithArgCtxIdent` {.threadvar.}: seq[BrokerContext]
495 var `tvWithArgHandlerIdent` {.threadvar.}: seq[`argProviderName`]
496 )
497
498 # ── sendReply helper (marshals Result into response slot bytes) ──────
499 # Protocol:
500 # 1. CAS Empty→Writing via pool.beginWrite. If it fails the
501 # requester abandoned; release the slot without writing.
502 # 2. Marshal `resp` into slotPayloadPtr(idx).
503 # 3. commitWrite (stores size + flips state to Ready, release-ordered).
504 # 4. Fire requester's signal.
505 result.add(
506 quote do:
507 proc `sendReplyIdent`(
508 pool: ptr ResponseSlotPool,
509 slotIdx: uint32,
510 requesterSignal: ThreadSignalPtr,
511 resp: Result[`payloadType`, string],
512 ) {.gcsafe, raises: [].} =
513 if pool.isNil or slotIdx == EmptyIdx:
514 return
515 if not pool[].beginWrite(slotIdx):
516 # Requester already abandoned — provider owns the release.
517 pool[].release(slotIdx, `shardHintIdent`())
518 return
519 let payloadPtr = pool[].slotPayloadPtr(slotIdx)
520 let written =
521 try:
522 `marshalRespIdent`(payloadPtr, int(pool[].slotPayloadCap), resp)
523 except Exception:
524 -1
525 if written >= 0:
526 pool[].commitWrite(slotIdx, uint32(written))
527 else:
528 # Response exceeded the inline slot — auto-spill onto the heap so the
529 # full response is delivered instead of replaced by an err. Falls back
530 # to an err only if the spill itself cannot be sized/allocated.
531 let needed =
532 try:
533 `marshalRespSizeIdent`(resp)
534 except Exception:
535 -1
536 var spilled = false
537 if needed >= 0 and needed <= `maxDynPayloadLit`:
538 let spillBuf = allocShared0(needed)
539 if not spillBuf.isNil:
540 let w2 =
541 try:
542 `marshalRespIdent`(
543 cast[ptr UncheckedArray[byte]](spillBuf), needed, resp
544 )
545 except Exception:
546 -1
547 if w2 < 0:
548 deallocShared(spillBuf)
549 else:
550 pool[].commitWriteOverflow(slotIdx, spillBuf, uint32(w2))
551 spilled = true
552 if not spilled:
553 # Could not spill (over ceiling / OOM / marshal error) — commit a
554 # compact err so the requester gets a clean failure, not garbage.
555 let fallback = err(
556 Result[`payloadType`, string],
557 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): response too large to deliver",
558 )
559 let writtenFb =
560 try:
561 `marshalRespIdent`(payloadPtr, int(pool[].slotPayloadCap), fallback)
562 except Exception:
563 -1
564 if writtenFb < 0:
565 pool[].commitWrite(slotIdx, 0'u32)
566 else:
567 pool[].commitWrite(slotIdx, uint32(writtenFb))
568 if not requesterSignal.isNil:
569 fireBrokerSignal(requesterSignal)
570
571 )
572
573 # ── handleMsg async (provider-side dispatch of a single ReqMsg) ──────
574 let msgIdent = ident("msg")
575 let loopCtxIdent = ident("loopCtx")
576 let poolIdent = ident("pool")
577
578 var handleBody = newStmtList()
579
580 if not zeroArgSig.isNil():
581 let handlerIdent0 = ident("handler0")
582 handleBody.add(
583 quote do:
584 if `msgIdent`.requestKind == 0:
585 var `handlerIdent0`: `zeroArgProviderName`
586 for i in 0 ..< `tvNoArgCtxIdent`.len:
587 if `tvNoArgCtxIdent`[i] == `loopCtxIdent`:
588 `handlerIdent0` = `tvNoArgHandlerIdent`[i]
589 break
590 if `handlerIdent0`.isNil():
591 `sendReplyIdent`(
592 `poolIdent`,
593 `msgIdent`.responseSlotIdx,
594 `msgIdent`.requesterSignal,
595 err(
596 Result[`payloadType`, string],
597 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): no zero-arg provider registered",
598 ),
599 )
600 else:
601 let catchedRes = catch:
602 await `handlerIdent0`()
603 if catchedRes.isErr():
604 `sendReplyIdent`(
605 `poolIdent`,
606 `msgIdent`.responseSlotIdx,
607 `msgIdent`.requesterSignal,
608 err(
609 Result[`payloadType`, string],
610 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): provider threw exception: " &
611 catchedRes.error.msg,
612 ),
613 )
614 else:
615 let providerRes = catchedRes.get()
616 when not (`payloadType` is void):
617 if providerRes.isOk():
618 let resultValue = providerRes.get()
619 when compiles(resultValue.isNil()) and
620 not (typeof(resultValue) is string):
621 if resultValue.isNil():
622 `sendReplyIdent`(
623 `poolIdent`,
624 `msgIdent`.responseSlotIdx,
625 `msgIdent`.requesterSignal,
626 err(
627 Result[`payloadType`, string],
628 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` &
629 "): provider returned nil result",
630 ),
631 )
632 return
633 `sendReplyIdent`(
634 `poolIdent`, `msgIdent`.responseSlotIdx, `msgIdent`.requesterSignal,
635 providerRes,
636 )
637 )
638
639 if not argSig.isNil():
640 let argNameIdents = collectParamNames(argParams)
641 let handlerIdent1 = ident("handler1")
642 var providerCall = newCall(handlerIdent1)
643 for argName in argNameIdents:
644 providerCall.add(newDotExpr(msgIdent, argName))
645
646 handleBody.add(
647 quote do:
648 if `msgIdent`.requestKind == 1:
649 var `handlerIdent1`: `argProviderName`
650 for i in 0 ..< `tvWithArgCtxIdent`.len:
651 if `tvWithArgCtxIdent`[i] == `loopCtxIdent`:
652 `handlerIdent1` = `tvWithArgHandlerIdent`[i]
653 break
654 if `handlerIdent1`.isNil():
655 `sendReplyIdent`(
656 `poolIdent`,
657 `msgIdent`.responseSlotIdx,
658 `msgIdent`.requesterSignal,
659 err(
660 Result[`payloadType`, string],
661 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` &
662 "): no provider registered for input signature",
663 ),
664 )
665 else:
666 let catchedRes = catch:
667 await `providerCall`
668 if catchedRes.isErr():
669 `sendReplyIdent`(
670 `poolIdent`,
671 `msgIdent`.responseSlotIdx,
672 `msgIdent`.requesterSignal,
673 err(
674 Result[`payloadType`, string],
675 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): provider threw exception: " &
676 catchedRes.error.msg,
677 ),
678 )
679 else:
680 let providerRes = catchedRes.get()
681 when not (`payloadType` is void):
682 if providerRes.isOk():
683 let resultValue = providerRes.get()
684 when compiles(resultValue.isNil()) and
685 not (typeof(resultValue) is string):
686 if resultValue.isNil():
687 `sendReplyIdent`(
688 `poolIdent`,
689 `msgIdent`.responseSlotIdx,
690 `msgIdent`.requesterSignal,
691 err(
692 Result[`payloadType`, string],
693 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` &
694 "): provider returned nil result",
695 ),
696 )
697 return
698 `sendReplyIdent`(
699 `poolIdent`, `msgIdent`.responseSlotIdx, `msgIdent`.requesterSignal,
700 providerRes,
701 )
702 )
703
704 result.add(
705 quote do:
706 proc `handleMsgIdent`(
707 `msgIdent`: `requestMsgName`,
708 `loopCtxIdent`: BrokerContext,
709 `poolIdent`: ptr ResponseSlotPool,
710 ) {.async: (raises: []).} =
711 `handleBody`
712
713 )
714
715 # ── Poll fn maker ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
716 # Dequeues cell idx from ring, unmarshals ReqMsg, dispatches. When the
717 # ring is closed and empty, registers its (ring, slab, pool) triple for
718 # synchronous deferred free at thread exit (see drainPendingRingFrees).
719 result.add(
720 quote do:
721 proc `pollFnMakerIdent`(
722 ring: ptr VyukovMpscRing[uint32],
723 slab: ptr PayloadSlab,
724 pool: ptr ResponseSlotPool,
725 loopCtx: BrokerContext,
726 ): ThreadDispatchPollFn =
727 let capturedRing = ring
728 let capturedSlab = slab
729 let capturedPool = pool
730 let capturedCtx = loopCtx
731 return proc(): int {.gcsafe, raises: [].} =
732 {.cast(gcsafe).}:
733 var cellIdx: uint32
734 if not capturedRing.tryDequeue(cellIdx):
735 if capturedRing.isClosed():
736 # Hand off to the thread-local pending-free registry; the
737 # processing-thread proc drains it synchronously after
738 # drainAsyncOps. Doing the free asynchronously here ran the
739 # refc allocator during shutdown teardown and SEGV'd on
740 # Linux + macOS ASAN (PR #13, deferredFreeReqRing path).
741 enqueuePendingRingFree(capturedRing, capturedSlab, capturedPool)
742 return 2
743 return 0
744 # Got a cell — unmarshal ReqMsg, dispatch. dataPtr/dataLen resolve
745 # the heap-spill buffer when the request spilled, else inline.
746 var msg: `requestMsgName`
747 let payloadPtr = capturedSlab[].dataPtr(cellIdx)
748 let payloadLen = capturedSlab[].dataLen(cellIdx)
749 let ok =
750 try:
751 `unmarshalIdent`(payloadPtr, payloadLen, msg)
752 except Exception:
753 false
754 if ok:
755 asyncSpawn `handleMsgIdent`(msg, capturedCtx, capturedPool)
756 else:
757 error "Failed to unmarshal request payload", requestType = `typeNameLit`
758 # Release the cell back to the slab — the unmarshaled msg
759 # holds its own copy on this thread's GC heap.
760 capturedSlab[].release(cellIdx, `shardHintIdent`())
761 return 1
762
763 )
764
765 # ── setProvider impl helper (reused by 4 public overloads) ───────────
766 # Allocates ring + slab + pool on the calling thread, registers the
767 # bucket, and starts the poller. Returns Result[void, string].
768 let setupBucketIdent = ident("setupBucket" & typeDisplayName)
769 result.add(
770 quote do:
771 proc `setupBucketIdent`(brokerCtx: BrokerContext): Result[void, string] =
772 let myThreadId = currentMtThreadId()
773 let myThreadGen = currentMtThreadGen()
774 var ring: ptr VyukovMpscRing[uint32]
775 var slab: ptr PayloadSlab
776 var pool: ptr ResponseSlotPool
777 withLock(`globalLockIdent`):
778 for i in 0 ..< `globalBucketCountIdent`:
779 if `globalBucketsIdent`[i].brokerCtx == brokerCtx:
780 if `globalBucketsIdent`[i].threadId == myThreadId and
781 `globalBucketsIdent`[i].threadGen == myThreadGen:
782 return ok() # already set on this thread
783 return err(
784 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` &
785 "): provider already set from another thread"
786 )
787 if `globalBucketCountIdent` >= `globalBucketCapIdent`:
788 `growProcIdent`()
789 ring = newVyukovMpscRing[uint32](`queueDepthLit`)
790 slab = cast[ptr PayloadSlab](createShared(PayloadSlab, 1))
791 initPayloadSlab(
792 slab[],
793 capacity = uint32(`slabCapacityLit`),
794 payloadBytes = uint32(`payloadBytesLit`),
795 nShards = `freeListShardsLit`,
796 )
797 pool = cast[ptr ResponseSlotPool](createShared(ResponseSlotPool, 1))
798 initResponseSlotPool(
799 pool[],
800 capacity = uint32(`responseSlotsLit`),
801 maxPayloadBytes = uint32(`responseBytesLit`),
802 nShards = `freeListShardsLit`,
803 )
804 let providerSig = getOrInitBrokerSignal()
805 let idx = `globalBucketCountIdent`
806 `globalBucketsIdent`[idx] = `bucketName`(
807 brokerCtx: brokerCtx,
808 ring: ring,
809 slab: slab,
810 responseSlotPool: pool,
811 providerSignal: providerSig,
812 threadId: myThreadId,
813 threadGen: myThreadGen,
814 )
815 `globalBucketCountIdent` += 1
816 registerBrokerPoller(`pollFnMakerIdent`(ring, slab, pool, brokerCtx))
817 ensureBrokerDispatchStarted()
818 ok()
819
820 )
821
822 # ── setProvider (zero-arg) ──────────────────────────────────────────
823 if not zeroArgSig.isNil():
824 result.add(
825 quote do:
826 proc setProvider*(
827 _: typedesc[`typeIdent`],
828 brokerCtx: BrokerContext,
829 handler: `zeroArgProviderName`,
830 ): Result[void, string] =
831 `initProcIdent`()
832 let myThreadGen = currentMtThreadGen()
833 for i in 0 ..< `tvNoArgCtxIdent`.len:
834 if `tvNoArgCtxIdent`[i] == brokerCtx:
835 var isStale = true
836 withLock(`globalLockIdent`):
837 for j in 0 ..< `globalBucketCountIdent`:
838 if `globalBucketsIdent`[j].brokerCtx == brokerCtx and
839 `globalBucketsIdent`[j].threadId == currentMtThreadId() and
840 `globalBucketsIdent`[j].threadGen == myThreadGen:
841 isStale = false
842 break
843 if isStale:
844 `tvNoArgCtxIdent`.del(i)
845 `tvNoArgHandlerIdent`.del(i)
846 break
847 else:
848 return err(
849 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` &
850 "): provider already set for broker context"
851 )
852 `tvNoArgCtxIdent`.add(brokerCtx)
853 `tvNoArgHandlerIdent`.add(handler)
854 let r = `setupBucketIdent`(brokerCtx)
855 if r.isErr():
856 `tvNoArgCtxIdent`.setLen(`tvNoArgCtxIdent`.len - 1)
857 `tvNoArgHandlerIdent`.setLen(`tvNoArgHandlerIdent`.len - 1)
858 return r
859 ok()
860
861 proc setProvider*(
862 _: typedesc[`typeIdent`], handler: `zeroArgProviderName`
863 ): Result[void, string] =
864 setProvider(`typeIdent`, DefaultBrokerContext, handler)
865
866 )
867
868 # ── setProvider (with-args) ─────────────────────────────────────────
869 if not argSig.isNil():
870 result.add(
871 quote do:
872 proc setProvider*(
873 _: typedesc[`typeIdent`],
874 brokerCtx: BrokerContext,
875 handler: `argProviderName`,
876 ): Result[void, string] =
877 `initProcIdent`()
878 let myThreadGen = currentMtThreadGen()
879 for i in 0 ..< `tvWithArgCtxIdent`.len:
880 if `tvWithArgCtxIdent`[i] == brokerCtx:
881 var isStale = true
882 withLock(`globalLockIdent`):
883 for j in 0 ..< `globalBucketCountIdent`:
884 if `globalBucketsIdent`[j].brokerCtx == brokerCtx and
885 `globalBucketsIdent`[j].threadId == currentMtThreadId() and
886 `globalBucketsIdent`[j].threadGen == myThreadGen:
887 isStale = false
888 break
889 if isStale:
890 `tvWithArgCtxIdent`.del(i)
891 `tvWithArgHandlerIdent`.del(i)
892 break
893 else:
894 return err(
895 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` &
896 "): provider already set for broker context"
897 )
898 `tvWithArgCtxIdent`.add(brokerCtx)
899 `tvWithArgHandlerIdent`.add(handler)
900 let r = `setupBucketIdent`(brokerCtx)
901 if r.isErr():
902 `tvWithArgCtxIdent`.setLen(`tvWithArgCtxIdent`.len - 1)
903 `tvWithArgHandlerIdent`.setLen(`tvWithArgHandlerIdent`.len - 1)
904 return r
905 ok()
906
907 proc setProvider*(
908 _: typedesc[`typeIdent`], handler: `argProviderName`
909 ): Result[void, string] =
910 setProvider(`typeIdent`, DefaultBrokerContext, handler)
911
912 )
913
914 # ── request helper: send and await one ReqMsg cross-thread ──────────
915 # Returns the response Result or an err on timeout / queue full.
916 let sendAndAwaitIdent = ident("sendAndAwait" & typeDisplayName)
917 result.add(
918 quote do:
919 proc `sendAndAwaitIdent`(
920 ring: ptr VyukovMpscRing[uint32],
921 slab: ptr PayloadSlab,
922 pool: ptr ResponseSlotPool,
923 providerSignal: ThreadSignalPtr,
924 msg: sink `requestMsgName`,
925 ): Future[Result[`payloadType`, string]] {.async: (raises: []).} =
926 ensureBrokerDispatchStarted()
927 let mySignal = getOrInitBrokerSignal()
928 # Reserve the response slot.
929 let slotIdx = pool[].claim(`shardHintIdent`())
930 if slotIdx == EmptyIdx:
931 return
932 err("RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): response slot pool exhausted")
933 # Reserve a slab cell, marshal ReqMsg into it.
934 let cellIdx = slab[].claim(`shardHintIdent`())
935 if cellIdx == EmptyIdx:
936 pool[].release(slotIdx, `shardHintIdent`())
937 return err("RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): request slab exhausted")
938 let cellPtr = slab[].cellPtr(cellIdx)
939 let payloadPtr = slab[].cellPayloadPtr(cellIdx)
940 var msgCopy = msg
941 msgCopy.responseSlotIdx = slotIdx
942 msgCopy.requesterSignal = mySignal
943 let written =
944 try:
945 `marshalIdent`(payloadPtr, int(slab[].cellPayloadCap), msgCopy)
946 except Exception:
947 -1
948 if written >= 0:
949 cellPtr.payloadSize = uint32(written)
950 else:
951 # Auto-spill the request onto the heap instead of failing.
952 let needed =
953 try:
954 `marshalSizeIdent`(msgCopy)
955 except Exception:
956 -1
957 if needed < 0 or needed > `maxDynPayloadLit`:
958 slab[].release(cellIdx, `shardHintIdent`())
959 pool[].release(slotIdx, `shardHintIdent`())
960 return err(
961 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` &
962 "): request payload exceeds maxDynamicPayloadBytes"
963 )
964 let spillBuf = allocShared0(needed)
965 if spillBuf.isNil:
966 slab[].release(cellIdx, `shardHintIdent`())
967 pool[].release(slotIdx, `shardHintIdent`())
968 return
969 err("RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): request spill alloc failed")
970 let w2 =
971 try:
972 `marshalIdent`(cast[ptr UncheckedArray[byte]](spillBuf), needed, msgCopy)
973 except Exception:
974 -1
975 if w2 < 0:
976 deallocShared(spillBuf)
977 slab[].release(cellIdx, `shardHintIdent`())
978 pool[].release(slotIdx, `shardHintIdent`())
979 return err("RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): request marshal failed")
980 slab[].setOverflow(cellIdx, spillBuf, uint32(w2))
981 cellPtr.refcount.store(1, moRelease)
982 if not ring.tryEnqueue(cellIdx):
983 slab[].release(cellIdx, `shardHintIdent`())
984 pool[].release(slotIdx, `shardHintIdent`())
985 return err("RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): provider queue full")
986 fireBrokerSignal(providerSignal)
987 # Register a one-shot response poller for this slot.
988 let responseFut =
989 newFuture[Result[`payloadType`, string]]("request." & `typeNameLit`)
990 let capturedPool = pool
991 let capturedSlotIdx = slotIdx
992 let capturedResponseFut = responseFut
993 registerBrokerPoller(
994 proc(): int {.gcsafe, raises: [].} =
995 {.cast(gcsafe).}:
996 if not capturedPool[].readyState(capturedSlotIdx):
997 return 0
998 # Unmarshal Result from slot bytes on THIS (requester) thread,
999 # so any string/seq inside lives on this thread's GC heap.
1000 # This is the §2.2 fix: no cross-thread `=copy` of the typed
1001 # Result value.
1002 var decoded: Result[`payloadType`, string]
1003 let payloadPtr = capturedPool[].respDataPtr(capturedSlotIdx)
1004 let payloadSize = capturedPool[].respDataLen(capturedSlotIdx)
1005 let ok =
1006 try:
1007 `unmarshalRespIdent`(payloadPtr, payloadSize, decoded)
1008 except Exception:
1009 false
1010 if not ok:
1011 decoded = err(
1012 Result[`payloadType`, string],
1013 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): response unmarshal failed",
1014 )
1015 if not capturedResponseFut.finished:
1016 capturedResponseFut.complete(decoded)
1017 capturedPool[].release(capturedSlotIdx, `shardHintIdent`())
1018 return 2
1019 )
1020 let completedRes = catch:
1021 await withTimeout(responseFut, `timeoutVarIdent`)
1022 if completedRes.isErr():
1023 responseFut.cancelSoon()
1024 discard capturedPool[].abandon(capturedSlotIdx)
1025 return err(
1026 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): recv failed: " &
1027 completedRes.error.msg
1028 )
1029 if not completedRes.get():
1030 responseFut.cancelSoon()
1031 discard capturedPool[].abandon(capturedSlotIdx)
1032 return err(
1033 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): cross-thread request timed out after " &
1034 $`timeoutVarIdent`
1035 )
1036 let recvRes = catch:
1037 responseFut.read()
1038 if recvRes.isErr():
1039 return err(
1040 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): recv failed: " & recvRes.error.msg
1041 )
1042 recvRes.get()
1043
1044 )
1045
1046 # ── blockingRequest helper: same as above but synchronous ────────────
1047 let blockingSendAndAwaitIdent = ident("blockingSendAndAwait" & typeDisplayName)
1048 result.add(
1049 quote do:
1050 proc `blockingSendAndAwaitIdent`(
1051 ring: ptr VyukovMpscRing[uint32],
1052 slab: ptr PayloadSlab,
1053 pool: ptr ResponseSlotPool,
1054 providerSignal: ThreadSignalPtr,
1055 msg: sink `requestMsgName`,
1056 ): Result[`payloadType`, string] {.gcsafe, raises: [].} =
1057 let slotIdx = pool[].claim(`shardHintIdent`())
1058 if slotIdx == EmptyIdx:
1059 return
1060 err("RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): response slot pool exhausted")
1061 let cellIdx = slab[].claim(`shardHintIdent`())
1062 if cellIdx == EmptyIdx:
1063 pool[].release(slotIdx, `shardHintIdent`())
1064 return err("RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): request slab exhausted")
1065 let cellPtr = slab[].cellPtr(cellIdx)
1066 let payloadPtr = slab[].cellPayloadPtr(cellIdx)
1067 var msgCopy = msg
1068 msgCopy.responseSlotIdx = slotIdx
1069 msgCopy.requesterSignal = nil # no async loop on this thread
1070 let written =
1071 try:
1072 `marshalIdent`(payloadPtr, int(slab[].cellPayloadCap), msgCopy)
1073 except Exception:
1074 -1
1075 if written >= 0:
1076 cellPtr.payloadSize = uint32(written)
1077 else:
1078 # Auto-spill the request onto the heap instead of failing.
1079 let needed =
1080 try:
1081 `marshalSizeIdent`(msgCopy)
1082 except Exception:
1083 -1
1084 if needed < 0 or needed > `maxDynPayloadLit`:
1085 slab[].release(cellIdx, `shardHintIdent`())
1086 pool[].release(slotIdx, `shardHintIdent`())
1087 return err(
1088 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` &
1089 "): request payload exceeds maxDynamicPayloadBytes"
1090 )
1091 let spillBuf = allocShared0(needed)
1092 if spillBuf.isNil:
1093 slab[].release(cellIdx, `shardHintIdent`())
1094 pool[].release(slotIdx, `shardHintIdent`())
1095 return
1096 err("RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): request spill alloc failed")
1097 let w2 =
1098 try:
1099 `marshalIdent`(cast[ptr UncheckedArray[byte]](spillBuf), needed, msgCopy)
1100 except Exception:
1101 -1
1102 if w2 < 0:
1103 deallocShared(spillBuf)
1104 slab[].release(cellIdx, `shardHintIdent`())
1105 pool[].release(slotIdx, `shardHintIdent`())
1106 return err("RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): request marshal failed")
1107 slab[].setOverflow(cellIdx, spillBuf, uint32(w2))
1108 cellPtr.refcount.store(1, moRelease)
1109 if not ring.tryEnqueue(cellIdx):
1110 slab[].release(cellIdx, `shardHintIdent`())
1111 pool[].release(slotIdx, `shardHintIdent`())
1112 return err("RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): provider queue full")
1113 fireBrokerSignal(providerSignal)
1114 # Busy-poll the response slot until ready or timeout.
1115 let deadline = Moment.now() + `timeoutVarIdent`
1116 while Moment.now() < deadline:
1117 if pool[].readyState(slotIdx):
1118 var decoded: Result[`payloadType`, string]
1119 let payloadPtr = pool[].respDataPtr(slotIdx)
1120 let payloadSize = pool[].respDataLen(slotIdx)
1121 let ok =
1122 try:
1123 `unmarshalRespIdent`(payloadPtr, payloadSize, decoded)
1124 except Exception:
1125 false
1126 pool[].release(slotIdx, `shardHintIdent`())
1127 if ok:
1128 return decoded
1129 return
1130 err("RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): response unmarshal failed")
1131 sleep(1)
1132 # Timeout: abandon the slot so a late provider write returns
1133 # the slot to the pool instead of leaving it stranded.
1134 discard pool[].abandon(slotIdx)
1135 return err(
1136 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): cross-thread request timed out after " &
1137 $`timeoutVarIdent`
1138 )
1139
1140 )
1141
1142 # ── request (zero-arg) ──────────────────────────────────────────────
1143 if not zeroArgSig.isNil():
1144 result.add(
1145 quote do:
1146 proc request*(
1147 _: typedesc[`typeIdent`], brokerCtx: BrokerContext
1148 ): Future[Result[`payloadType`, string]] {.async: (raises: []).} =
1149 `initProcIdent`()
1150 var ring: ptr VyukovMpscRing[uint32]
1151 var slab: ptr PayloadSlab
1152 var pool: ptr ResponseSlotPool
1153 var providerSignal: ThreadSignalPtr
1154 var sameThread = false
1155 let myThreadGen = currentMtThreadGen()
1156 withLock(`globalLockIdent`):
1157 for i in 0 ..< `globalBucketCountIdent`:
1158 if `globalBucketsIdent`[i].brokerCtx == brokerCtx:
1159 if `globalBucketsIdent`[i].threadId == currentMtThreadId() and
1160 `globalBucketsIdent`[i].threadGen == myThreadGen:
1161 sameThread = true
1162 else:
1163 ring = `globalBucketsIdent`[i].ring
1164 slab = `globalBucketsIdent`[i].slab
1165 pool = `globalBucketsIdent`[i].responseSlotPool
1166 providerSignal = `globalBucketsIdent`[i].providerSignal
1167 break
1168 if sameThread:
1169 var provider: `zeroArgProviderName`
1170 for i in 0 ..< `tvNoArgCtxIdent`.len:
1171 if `tvNoArgCtxIdent`[i] == brokerCtx:
1172 provider = `tvNoArgHandlerIdent`[i]
1173 break
1174 if provider.isNil():
1175 return err(
1176 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): no zero-arg provider registered"
1177 )
1178 let catchedRes = catch:
1179 await provider()
1180 if catchedRes.isErr():
1181 return err(
1182 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): provider threw exception: " &
1183 catchedRes.error.msg
1184 )
1185 return catchedRes.get()
1186 if ring.isNil:
1187 return err(
1188 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` &
1189 "): no zero-arg provider registered for broker context " & $brokerCtx
1190 )
1191 var msg = `requestMsgName`(requestKind: 0)
1192 return await `sendAndAwaitIdent`(ring, slab, pool, providerSignal, msg)
1193
1194 proc request*(
1195 _: typedesc[`typeIdent`]
1196 ): Future[Result[`payloadType`, string]] {.async: (raises: []).} =
1197 return await request(`typeIdent`, DefaultBrokerContext)
1198
1199 )
1200 else:
1201 result.add(
1202 quote do:
1203 proc request*(
1204 _: typedesc[`typeIdent`]
1205 ): Future[Result[`payloadType`, string]] {.async: (raises: []).} =
1206 return
1207 err("RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): no zero-arg provider registered")
1208
1209 )
1210
1211 # ── blockingRequest (zero-arg) ──────────────────────────────────────
1212 if not zeroArgSig.isNil():
1213 result.add(
1214 quote do:
1215 proc blockingRequest*(
1216 _: typedesc[`typeIdent`], brokerCtx: BrokerContext
1217 ): Result[`payloadType`, string] {.gcsafe, raises: [].} =
1218 `initProcIdent`()
1219 var ring: ptr VyukovMpscRing[uint32]
1220 var slab: ptr PayloadSlab
1221 var pool: ptr ResponseSlotPool
1222 var providerSignal: ThreadSignalPtr
1223 var sameThread = false
1224 let myThreadGen = currentMtThreadGen()
1225 withLock(`globalLockIdent`):
1226 for i in 0 ..< `globalBucketCountIdent`:
1227 if `globalBucketsIdent`[i].brokerCtx == brokerCtx:
1228 if `globalBucketsIdent`[i].threadId == currentMtThreadId() and
1229 `globalBucketsIdent`[i].threadGen == myThreadGen:
1230 sameThread = true
1231 else:
1232 ring = `globalBucketsIdent`[i].ring
1233 slab = `globalBucketsIdent`[i].slab
1234 pool = `globalBucketsIdent`[i].responseSlotPool
1235 providerSignal = `globalBucketsIdent`[i].providerSignal
1236 break
1237 if sameThread:
1238 var provider: `zeroArgProviderName`
1239 for i in 0 ..< `tvNoArgCtxIdent`.len:
1240 if `tvNoArgCtxIdent`[i] == brokerCtx:
1241 provider = `tvNoArgHandlerIdent`[i]
1242 break
1243 if provider.isNil():
1244 return err(
1245 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): no zero-arg provider registered"
1246 )
1247 let catchedRes = catch:
1248 blockingAwait(provider())
1249 if catchedRes.isErr():
1250 return err(
1251 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): provider threw exception: " &
1252 catchedRes.error.msg
1253 )
1254 return catchedRes.get()
1255 if ring.isNil:
1256 return err(
1257 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` &
1258 "): no zero-arg provider registered for broker context " & $brokerCtx
1259 )
1260 var msg = `requestMsgName`(requestKind: 0)
1261 `blockingSendAndAwaitIdent`(ring, slab, pool, providerSignal, msg)
1262
1263 proc blockingRequest*(
1264 _: typedesc[`typeIdent`]
1265 ): Result[`payloadType`, string] {.gcsafe, raises: [].} =
1266 blockingRequest(`typeIdent`, DefaultBrokerContext)
1267
1268 )
1269 else:
1270 result.add(
1271 quote do:
1272 proc blockingRequest*(
1273 _: typedesc[`typeIdent`]
1274 ): Result[`payloadType`, string] {.gcsafe, raises: [].} =
1275 return
1276 err("RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): no zero-arg provider registered")
1277
1278 )
1279
1280 # ── request (with-args) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
1281 if not argSig.isNil():
1282 let requestParamDefs = cloneParams(argParams)
1283 let argNameIdents = collectParamNames(requestParamDefs)
1284
1285 # Build the keyed (ctx-explicit) request proc.
1286 let reqPragmas = quote:
1287 {.async: (raises: []).}
1288 let typedescParam =
1289 newTree(nnkBracketExpr, ident("typedesc"), copyNimTree(typeIdent))
1290
1291 var keyedFormalParams = newTree(nnkFormalParams)
1292 keyedFormalParams.add(copyNimTree(returnType))
1293 keyedFormalParams.add(
1294 newTree(nnkIdentDefs, ident("_"), typedescParam, newEmptyNode())
1295 )
1296 keyedFormalParams.add(
1297 newTree(nnkIdentDefs, ident("brokerCtx"), ident("BrokerContext"), newEmptyNode())
1298 )
1299 for paramDef in requestParamDefs:
1300 keyedFormalParams.add(paramDef)
1301
1302 80 let providerSym = genSym(nskVar, "provider")
1303 var providerCall = newCall(providerSym)
1304 for argName in argNameIdents:
1305 providerCall.add(argName)
1306
1307 var msgCtor = newTree(nnkObjConstr, requestMsgName)
1308 msgCtor.add(newTree(nnkExprColonExpr, ident("requestKind"), newLit(1)))
1309 for argName in argNameIdents:
1310 msgCtor.add(newTree(nnkExprColonExpr, argName, argName))
1311
1312 let keyedBody = quote:
1313 `initProcIdent`()
1314 var ring: ptr VyukovMpscRing[uint32]
1315 var slab: ptr PayloadSlab
1316 var pool: ptr ResponseSlotPool
1317 var providerSignal: ThreadSignalPtr
1318 var sameThread = false
1319 let myThreadGen = currentMtThreadGen()
1320 withLock(`globalLockIdent`):
1321 for i in 0 ..< `globalBucketCountIdent`:
1322 if `globalBucketsIdent`[i].brokerCtx == brokerCtx:
1323 if `globalBucketsIdent`[i].threadId == currentMtThreadId() and
1324 `globalBucketsIdent`[i].threadGen == myThreadGen:
1325 sameThread = true
1326 else:
1327 ring = `globalBucketsIdent`[i].ring
1328 slab = `globalBucketsIdent`[i].slab
1329 pool = `globalBucketsIdent`[i].responseSlotPool
1330 providerSignal = `globalBucketsIdent`[i].providerSignal
1331 break
1332 if sameThread:
1333 var `providerSym`: `argProviderName`
1334 for i in 0 ..< `tvWithArgCtxIdent`.len:
1335 if `tvWithArgCtxIdent`[i] == brokerCtx:
1336 `providerSym` = `tvWithArgHandlerIdent`[i]
1337 break
1338 if `providerSym`.isNil():
1339 return err(
1340 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` &
1341 "): no provider registered for input signature"
1342 )
1343 let catchedRes = catch:
1344 await `providerCall`
1345 if catchedRes.isErr():
1346 return err(
1347 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): provider threw exception: " &
1348 catchedRes.error.msg
1349 )
1350 return catchedRes.get()
1351 if ring.isNil:
1352 return err(
1353 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` &
1354 "): no provider registered for broker context " & $brokerCtx
1355 )
1356 var msg = `msgCtor`
1357 return await `sendAndAwaitIdent`(ring, slab, pool, providerSignal, msg)
1358
1359 result.add(
1360 newTree(
1361 nnkProcDef,
1362 postfix(ident("request"), "*"),
1363 newEmptyNode(),
1364 newEmptyNode(),
1365 keyedFormalParams,
1366 reqPragmas,
1367 newEmptyNode(),
1368 keyedBody,
1369 )
1370 )
1371
1372 # Non-keyed forwarder.
1373 var nonKeyedFormalParams = newTree(nnkFormalParams)
1374 nonKeyedFormalParams.add(copyNimTree(returnType))
1375 nonKeyedFormalParams.add(
1376 newTree(nnkIdentDefs, ident("_"), typedescParam, newEmptyNode())
1377 )
1378 for paramDef in cloneParams(argParams):
1379 nonKeyedFormalParams.add(paramDef)
1380
1381 var forwardCall = newCall(ident("request"))
1382 forwardCall.add(copyNimTree(typeIdent))
1383 forwardCall.add(ident("DefaultBrokerContext"))
1384 for argName in argNameIdents:
1385 forwardCall.add(argName)
1386 let forwardBody = quote:
1387 return await `forwardCall`
1388
1389 result.add(
1390 newTree(
1391 nnkProcDef,
1392 postfix(ident("request"), "*"),
1393 newEmptyNode(),
1394 newEmptyNode(),
1395 nonKeyedFormalParams,
1396 reqPragmas,
1397 newEmptyNode(),
1398 forwardBody,
1399 )
1400 )
1401
1402 # ── blockingRequest (with-args) ─────────────────────────────────────
1403 if not argSig.isNil():
1404 let brParamDefs = cloneParams(argParams)
1405 let brArgNameIdents = collectParamNames(brParamDefs)
1406 let brPragmas = quote:
1407 {.gcsafe, raises: [].}
1408 let typedescParam =
1409 newTree(nnkBracketExpr, ident("typedesc"), copyNimTree(typeIdent))
1410
1411 var brKeyedFormalParams = newTree(nnkFormalParams)
1412 brKeyedFormalParams.add(
1413 newTree(nnkBracketExpr, ident("Result"), copyNimTree(typeIdent), ident("string"))
1414 )
1415 brKeyedFormalParams.add(
1416 newTree(nnkIdentDefs, ident("_"), typedescParam, newEmptyNode())
1417 )
1418 brKeyedFormalParams.add(
1419 newTree(nnkIdentDefs, ident("brokerCtx"), ident("BrokerContext"), newEmptyNode())
1420 )
1421 for paramDef in brParamDefs:
1422 brKeyedFormalParams.add(paramDef)
1423
1424 let brProviderSym = genSym(nskVar, "provider")
1425 var brProviderCall = newCall(brProviderSym)
1426 for argName in brArgNameIdents:
1427 brProviderCall.add(argName)
1428
1429 var brMsgCtor = newTree(nnkObjConstr, requestMsgName)
1430 brMsgCtor.add(newTree(nnkExprColonExpr, ident("requestKind"), newLit(1)))
1431 for argName in brArgNameIdents:
1432 brMsgCtor.add(newTree(nnkExprColonExpr, argName, argName))
1433
1434 let brKeyedBody = quote:
1435 `initProcIdent`()
1436 var ring: ptr VyukovMpscRing[uint32]
1437 var slab: ptr PayloadSlab
1438 var pool: ptr ResponseSlotPool
1439 var providerSignal: ThreadSignalPtr
1440 var sameThread = false
1441 let myThreadGen = currentMtThreadGen()
1442 withLock(`globalLockIdent`):
1443 for i in 0 ..< `globalBucketCountIdent`:
1444 if `globalBucketsIdent`[i].brokerCtx == brokerCtx:
1445 if `globalBucketsIdent`[i].threadId == currentMtThreadId() and
1446 `globalBucketsIdent`[i].threadGen == myThreadGen:
1447 sameThread = true
1448 else:
1449 ring = `globalBucketsIdent`[i].ring
1450 slab = `globalBucketsIdent`[i].slab
1451 pool = `globalBucketsIdent`[i].responseSlotPool
1452 providerSignal = `globalBucketsIdent`[i].providerSignal
1453 break
1454 if sameThread:
1455 var `brProviderSym`: `argProviderName`
1456 for i in 0 ..< `tvWithArgCtxIdent`.len:
1457 if `tvWithArgCtxIdent`[i] == brokerCtx:
1458 `brProviderSym` = `tvWithArgHandlerIdent`[i]
1459 break
1460 if `brProviderSym`.isNil():
1461 return err(
1462 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` &
1463 "): no provider registered for input signature"
1464 )
1465 let catchedRes = catch:
1466 blockingAwait(`brProviderCall`)
1467 if catchedRes.isErr():
1468 return err(
1469 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): provider threw exception: " &
1470 catchedRes.error.msg
1471 )
1472 return catchedRes.get()
1473 if ring.isNil:
1474 return err(
1475 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` &
1476 "): no provider registered for broker context " & $brokerCtx
1477 )
1478 var msg = `brMsgCtor`
1479 `blockingSendAndAwaitIdent`(ring, slab, pool, providerSignal, msg)
1480
1481 result.add(
1482 newTree(
1483 nnkProcDef,
1484 postfix(ident("blockingRequest"), "*"),
1485 newEmptyNode(),
1486 newEmptyNode(),
1487 brKeyedFormalParams,
1488 brPragmas,
1489 newEmptyNode(),
1490 brKeyedBody,
1491 )
1492 )
1493
1494 # Non-keyed forwarder.
1495 var brNonKeyedFormalParams = newTree(nnkFormalParams)
1496 brNonKeyedFormalParams.add(
1497 newTree(nnkBracketExpr, ident("Result"), copyNimTree(typeIdent), ident("string"))
1498 )
1499 brNonKeyedFormalParams.add(
1500 newTree(nnkIdentDefs, ident("_"), typedescParam, newEmptyNode())
1501 )
1502 for paramDef in cloneParams(argParams):
1503 brNonKeyedFormalParams.add(paramDef)
1504
1505 var brForwardCall = newCall(ident("blockingRequest"))
1506 brForwardCall.add(copyNimTree(typeIdent))
1507 brForwardCall.add(ident("DefaultBrokerContext"))
1508 for argName in brArgNameIdents:
1509 brForwardCall.add(argName)
1510 let brForwardBody = quote:
1511 `brForwardCall`
1512
1513 result.add(
1514 newTree(
1515 nnkProcDef,
1516 postfix(ident("blockingRequest"), "*"),
1517 newEmptyNode(),
1518 newEmptyNode(),
1519 brNonKeyedFormalParams,
1520 brPragmas,
1521 newEmptyNode(),
1522 brForwardBody,
1523 )
1524 )
1525
1526 # ── clearProvider ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
1527 let brokerCtxParam = ident("brokerCtx")
1528 var tvCleanup = newStmtList()
1529 if not zeroArgSig.isNil():
1530 tvCleanup.add(
1531 quote do:
1532 for i in countdown(`tvNoArgCtxIdent`.len - 1, 0):
1533 if `tvNoArgCtxIdent`[i] == `brokerCtxParam`:
1534 `tvNoArgCtxIdent`.del(i)
1535 `tvNoArgHandlerIdent`.del(i)
1536 break
1537 )
1538 if not argSig.isNil():
1539 tvCleanup.add(
1540 quote do:
1541 for i in countdown(`tvWithArgCtxIdent`.len - 1, 0):
1542 if `tvWithArgCtxIdent`[i] == `brokerCtxParam`:
1543 `tvWithArgCtxIdent`.del(i)
1544 `tvWithArgHandlerIdent`.del(i)
1545 break
1546 )
1547
1548 let clearBody = quote:
1549 `initProcIdent`()
1550 var ring: ptr VyukovMpscRing[uint32]
1551 var providerSignal: ThreadSignalPtr
1552 var isProviderThread = false
1553 let myThreadGen = currentMtThreadGen()
1554 withLock(`globalLockIdent`):
1555 var foundIdx = -1
1556 for i in 0 ..< `globalBucketCountIdent`:
1557 if `globalBucketsIdent`[i].brokerCtx == `brokerCtxParam`:
1558 ring = `globalBucketsIdent`[i].ring
1559 providerSignal = `globalBucketsIdent`[i].providerSignal
1560 isProviderThread = (
1561 `globalBucketsIdent`[i].threadId == currentMtThreadId() and
1562 `globalBucketsIdent`[i].threadGen == myThreadGen
1563 )
1564 foundIdx = i
1565 break
1566 if foundIdx >= 0:
1567 for i in foundIdx ..< `globalBucketCountIdent` - 1:
1568 `globalBucketsIdent`[i] = `globalBucketsIdent`[i + 1]
1569 `globalBucketCountIdent` -= 1
1570 if isProviderThread:
1571 `tvCleanup`
1572 if not ring.isNil:
1573 ring.close()
1574 fireBrokerSignal(providerSignal)
1575
1576 var formalParamsClear = newTree(nnkFormalParams)
1577 formalParamsClear.add(newEmptyNode())
1578 formalParamsClear.add(
1579 newTree(
1580 nnkIdentDefs,
1581 ident("_"),
1582 newTree(nnkBracketExpr, ident("typedesc"), copyNimTree(typeIdent)),
1583 newEmptyNode(),
1584 )
1585 )
1586 formalParamsClear.add(
1587 newTree(nnkIdentDefs, brokerCtxParam, ident("BrokerContext"), newEmptyNode())
1588 )
1589 result.add(
1590 newTree(
1591 nnkProcDef,
1592 postfix(ident("clearProvider"), "*"),
1593 newEmptyNode(),
1594 newEmptyNode(),
1595 formalParamsClear,
1596 newEmptyNode(),
1597 newEmptyNode(),
1598 clearBody,
1599 )
1600 )
1601
1602 result.add(
1603 quote do:
1604 proc clearProvider*(_: typedesc[`typeIdent`]) =
1605 clearProvider(`typeIdent`, DefaultBrokerContext)
1606
1607 )
1608
1609 # ── isProvided ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
1610 let isProvidedCtxParam = ident("brokerCtx")
1611 let isProvidedBody = quote:
1612 `initProcIdent`()
1613 withLock(`globalLockIdent`):
1614 for i in 0 ..< `globalBucketCountIdent`:
1615 if `globalBucketsIdent`[i].brokerCtx == `isProvidedCtxParam`:
1616 return true
1617 return false
1618
1619 var formalParamsIsProvided = newTree(nnkFormalParams)
1620 formalParamsIsProvided.add(ident("bool"))
1621 formalParamsIsProvided.add(
1622 newTree(
1623 nnkIdentDefs,
1624 ident("_"),
1625 newTree(nnkBracketExpr, ident("typedesc"), copyNimTree(typeIdent)),
1626 newEmptyNode(),
1627 )
1628 )
1629 formalParamsIsProvided.add(
1630 newTree(nnkIdentDefs, isProvidedCtxParam, ident("BrokerContext"), newEmptyNode())
1631 )
1632
1633 result.add(
1634 newTree(
1635 nnkProcDef,
1636 postfix(ident("isProvided"), "*"),
1637 newEmptyNode(),
1638 newEmptyNode(),
1639 formalParamsIsProvided,
1640 newEmptyNode(),
1641 newEmptyNode(),
1642 isProvidedBody,
1643 )
1644 )
1645
1646 result.add(
1647
